instructions: CRITICAL: Set dir="rtl" on the outermost wrapping div or HTML tag. This automatically flips standard flexbox row directions.

CRITICAL: Use logical Tailwind properties. Replace `ml-` with `ms-`, `pr-` with `pe-`, `border-l` with `border-s`, `border-r` with `border-e`, `text-left` with `text-start`, `text-right` with `text-end`.

CRITICAL: Do NOT manually reverse flex containers using `flex-row-reverse` unless explicitly needed for a sub-component that breaks flow. Natively `flex-row` with `dir="rtl"` places the first DOM element on the far right.
CRITICAL: Since Sidebar is the first element in the Flex row, it will visually appear on the Right.

headings.custom_instruction: Map font-sans to 'Muna', system-ui, sans-serif in tailwind config.

code_and_tokens.custom_instruction: Map font-mono to 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace in tailwind config.

layout.structure: Three-pane horizontal split. Container uses `h-screen w-full flex bg-background text-foreground overflow-hidden`.

panes.name: Sidebar (Navigation)
panes.classes: w-64 flex-shrink-0 border-e border-border bg-surface flex flex-col h-full
panes.content: Branding (Sahib Design), Navigation Links (Tokens, Spacing, Typography, etc), Theme Toggle, Action Buttons (Save/Export).

panes.name: Editor Panel
panes.classes: flex-1 flex flex-col h-full bg-background overflow-y-auto relative
panes.content: Contextual Token Editor based on selected sidebar item. Features grids of inputs, color pickers, and range sliders.

panes.name: Live Preview Panel
panes.classes: w-[400px] 2xl:w-[500px] flex-shrink-0 border-s border-border bg-muted/30 p-8 overflow-y-auto hidden lg:flex flex-col gap-12
panes.content: Live representation of the tokens. Example buttons, text hierarchies, spacing blocks, color swatches. Updates instantly.

color_picker.description: Combines a native input[type='color'] styled as a circular swatch, paired with a text input for the HEX code.
color_picker.classes: flex items-center gap-3 p-2 rounded-md border border-border bg-surface shadow-sm focus-within:border-primary

token_input.description: Text or number input for spacing/radius/typography values.
token_input.classes: w-full bg-transparent font-mono text-sm focus:outline-none placeholder:text-muted-foreground

token_card.description: Card holding a single token editable field.
token_card.classes: p-4 border border-border rounded-lg bg-surface flex flex-col gap-2 transition-colors hover:border-primary/50

section_header.description: Sticky header for each token section.
section_header.classes: sticky top-0 z-10 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border px-8 py-6

motion.hover_state: Slight border highlight `hover:border-primary/50`. No heavy shadows.

icons.instruction: Use lucide-react icons for the sidebar navigation (Palette, Type, Maximize, Layers, Moon, Sun, Save, Download).

preview_hero_image.description: Abstract 3D geometric shape for the live preview sample hero card.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: The entire app must be written with `dir="rtl"` in mind. The root element must have `dir="rtl"`.
Do NOT use `flex-row-reverse` to force right-to-left. `dir="rtl"` handles it natively. Simply place the Sidebar first in your JSX, then Editor, then Preview.
Initialize state with default Sahib design tokens (Colors, Typography, Spacing, Radius, etc).
Create a 'useTokens' context or complex state object to store and pass tokens. Values should update live in the Live Preview panel.
The Save to LocalStorage functionality should stringify the current tokens state.
The Export functionality should generate downloadable blobs for .json, .css, and .md.
Apply `font-sans` to UI text, and `font-mono` to token values and input fields.
All interactive elements MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="export-json-button"`).
Use standard HTML `input type='color'` for the color picker, styled appropriately.
Use Tailwind dark mode class strategy. Provide a toggle in the sidebar that switches the `dark` class on the root element.
The Live Preview panel must apply the user-edited tokens via inline styles (e.g. `style={{ backgroundColor: tokens.colors.primary, borderRadius: tokens.radius.md }}`) to reflect changes instantly.
